system.description: Seashells that fell from Enar's transformed body during combat. Erik recognizes these as identical to shells he collected when he lived with his mother in a small cliffside village. According to old stories, under that cliff there is a dense network of caves where a Sea Fairy is said to reside - the same fairy who gave Enar his immortal form.
system.location: Andersen's estate (after first encounter with Enar)
